mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_notification (receiver_id, sender_id, post_id, type, message, read_yn, created_date) VALUES (#{receiverId}, #{senderId}, #{postId}, #{type}, #{message}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, receiver_id, sender_id, post_id, type, message, read_yn, created_date FROM tb_notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_yn = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_notification SET read_yn = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_notification SET read_yn = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_yn = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_yn = 0
